data.body: Resolved in PR #93 (commit d755bfe4e). Added _coalesce_value_opts normalizer in reads_cli.py so list/session-logs/search/list-epics/ready accept BOTH '--opt value' and '--opt=value' (matching ready/composer/--output/docs). Malformed values + unknown options still error. Documented accept-both in docs/exit-codes.md. Regression tests: tests/interfaces/facades/test_cli_space_form_options.py (3 tests, RED->GREEN, mutation-checked). Verified: 'session-logs --limit 5' now exit 0; 'list --status open' exit 0; '--limit abc' still rejected.
